summary: rc.25 Archive Skill Redesign — introduce session as a first-class concept in fabric-archive: 5-entry-point model (E1 hook-passive / E2 user-active / E3 AI-self-trigger / E4 user-range-rollback / E5 cron-daily), new `session_archive_attempted` event type for per-session outcome tracking, Phase -0.5 Range Resolution (time-window + topic-keyword), outcome-based re-scan filter with 12h anti-loop, Phase 0.4 onboard gate (E2-only), silent-skip path on no-candidate, minimal hook hint copy fix (cross-session count + project-level debt wording), AGENTS.md E3 self-trigger policy with 4 triggers + 3 anti-loop guards, `fab doctor --archive-history` observability subcommand. Resolves the user-reported 'new session being nagged by accumulated cross-session debt' pain point and structurally fixes the 'no record of which sessions have been archived' gap.
approach: 13-task chain across 4 waves. Wave 1 (schema + AGENTS.md, parallel-eligible): event-ledger schema升级 (session_archive_attempted + session_id on plan_context) + archive-hint文案 + AGENTS.md E3 policy. Wave 2 (skill core): Phase -0.5 Range Resolution + Phase 0.0 outcome-based re-scan + Phase 0.4 trigger gate + silent-skip path. Wave 3 (E5 docs + doctor tooling): E5 周期触发附录 + `fab doctor --archive-history` subcommand. Wave 4 (integration + closure): 集成测试 + CHANGELOG + dogfood + Gemini batch review. 沿用 rc.20/rc.24 single-theme per-task-commit pattern.

waves.label: Schema + AGENTS.md 基础
waves.rationale: Schema 是 W2/W3 所有 skill+doctor 逻辑的契约源,必须先落; AGENTS.md 改动独立无依赖,可并行;archive-hint文案改造仅依赖 TASK-02 (session_id 字段)。这一波 4 任务可大幅并行。

waves.label: Skill 核心改造
waves.rationale: 依赖 Wave 1 schema (TASK-01 session_archive_attempted + TASK-02 session_id);skill 内部各 Phase 改造可并行写,但同 SKILL.md 文件需串行 merge。

waves.label: E5 文档 + Doctor 工具
waves.rationale: TASK-08 (E5 文档附录) 依赖 TASK-04 Phase -0.5; TASK-10 (doctor --archive-history) 依赖 TASK-01 schema + TASK-02 session_id 字段。两者独立,可并行。

waves.label: 集成 + 收尾
waves.rationale: 集成测试依赖前面所有 task; CHANGELOG + dogfood 依赖 TASK-11 绿; Gemini batch review 依赖 TASK-12 dogfood evidence。三者串行。

design_decisions.decision: Schema A — single source of truth via `session_archive_attempted` event in events.jsonl (NOT separate cache file)
design_decisions.rationale: events.jsonl 已经是项目唯一真相源, 加事件类型符合现有架构; rc.22 rotation 天然覆盖; 不引入第二个状态系统; fab doctor 可直接 grep 审计。Grill-me locked Q3.2.
design_decisions.tradeoff: events.jsonl 行数增加,但每次 skill 调用才写 1 条,远低于 plan_context 频率,可忽略。

design_decisions.decision: Hook minimal fix — 仅改文案 + 跨会话计数 (NOT 双 AND session_ready trigger)
design_decisions.rationale: 用户痛点是认知错位(不知道这是跨会话累计)而非频次过高。文案如实告知即解决 90% 痛点; 完整 C 方案需 5 个新 config + escape valve + session-level event filter, 性价比不足。Grill-me 收敛 Q2.
design_decisions.tradeoff: 新会话 1 条消息就被提示的 S1 痛点仍存在,但用户看到文案即理解'这不是本会话的债',认知不再错位。

design_decisions.decision: 5 入口模型 (E1+E2+E3+E4+E5), CLI flag 入口被砍
design_decisions.rationale: E4 (用户语义指定范围) 通过 prompt 解析实现, 不需要 CLI flag — 遵守 cli design 原则 '能交互选的就别做 flag'; E5 通过 OS cron / /loop 调 E4-today, fab 端零代码。Grill-me locked Q3.1.
design_decisions.tradeoff: 用户需要用自然语言描述范围(`上周的归档下`/`今日复盘`),不能用 `--since=7d` 这种工程化语法; skill 需要内置 range parsing 逻辑。

design_decisions.decision: E3-strong (AI 直接调 skill + 事后告知) over E3-soft (AI 先问用户)
design_decisions.rationale: 更连贯,用户不会被打断; Phase 0.5 viability gate + user_dismissed 反馈环兜底 AI 误判; 用户事后可 fab_review reject 清掉。Grill-me locked Q3.5.
design_decisions.tradeoff: AI 可能在用户不预期时插入'顺手归档'通知; mitigation: 模板格式简洁固定 + 3 条 anti-loop。

design_decisions.decision: Phase 0.4 onboard gate — 仅 E2 显式调用时跑, E1/E3/E5 skip
design_decisions.rationale: Onboard 是首装基调收集,只该在用户主动归档时刻出现; hook/AI/cron 非主动场景弹问会破坏流。Grill-me locked Q3.6.
design_decisions.tradeoff: 若用户首次接触 fabric 仅通过 E1 hook 提示, Phase 0.4 onboard 不会自动触发, 需用户显式调 E2 才触发; documented in SKILL.md.

design_decisions.decision: 复扫触发 — outcome-based + 高价值信号 filter + 12h anti-loop
design_decisions.rationale: outcome=user_dismissed 永不自动复扫(尊重用户决定); 其他 outcome 看 covered_through_ts 之后是否含 plan_context/edit/normative 等高价值信号; 12h cooldown 跟 hook 心智对齐。Grill-me locked Q3.4.
design_decisions.tradeoff: 纯 assistant_turn_observed 累积不会触发复扫(避免闲聊噪声拉起),但聊天型 guideline 仍可能漏触发 — 由 E3 self-trigger 兜底吸收。

design_decisions.decision: Per-task commit style (13 commits, 一 TASK 一 commit)
design_decisions.rationale: rc.20/rc.24 precedent (12 commits each) + user preference; 每 TASK = atomic, reviewable, revertable; schema bug → bisect granularity per-TASK.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Slightly higher orchestration overhead vs single mega-commit; well worth it for review surface.

design_decisions.decision: Single-RC scope (α 方案), 不拆 3 RC
design_decisions.rationale: rc.24 即将完成, rc.25 接续做 archive redesign; 设计已完整, 拆 RC 反而拖长 soak 期; 沿用 rc.22/rc.23 combined-scope precedent。User confirmed Q4.
design_decisions.tradeoff: rc.25 LoC 体量(~585)略大于平均 RC, 但远小于 rc.22/rc.23 (623/1456 测试覆盖); 仍在单 RC 可控范围。

data_flow.diagram: 用户/Hook/AI/Cron triggers fabric-archive → Phase -0.5 Range Resolution (parse prompt for time-window | topic-keywords | session_ids) → Phase 0.0 Cross-Session Digest collection (apply outcome filter via session_archive_attempted events; skip user_dismissed; check covered_through_ts vs current max event ts; apply 12h re-scan cooldown) → Phase 0.4 Onboard Coverage (gated by entry context — only E2 runs onboard, E1/E3/E5 skip) → Phase 0.5 Viability Gate (unchanged) → Phase 1-2 Classify+Persist (unchanged) → write session_archive_attempted event with outcome+covered_through_ts → fab doctor --archive-history reads events.jsonl tail and renders bilingual session-by-session table

user_facing_steps: 2. cd <project> && fab install  (syncs new archive-hint copy + AGENTS.md E3 policy to all clients)
3. (optional) Configure /loop or OS cron for E5 daily recap per docs/archive-cron.md
backward_compat: Old events.jsonl without session_archive_attempted entries — natural cold-start, skill treats all unproposed sessions as in-scope (current behavior)
Old plan_context events without session_id — backfill not required; new wording falls back to '~N 个会话(部分未标记)' when session_id missing
AGENTS.md E3 section is additive — does NOT override or modify existing cite policy

rc24_coordination.blocking_dependency: rc.24 must merge before rc.25 starts — share events.jsonl schema_version field
rebase_actions: AGENTS.md: text-level merge of rc.24 cite contract section + rc.25 E3 section
doctor.ts: rc.24 adds --cite-coverage subcommand handler; rc.25 adds --archive-history alongside (separate switch case)

out_of_scope: Hook 双 AND session_ready trigger (Q2 完整 C 方案推迟)
复扫触发的 LLM 语义判断 (太贵, 用高价值信号 filter 替代)
Multi-client 并发 race fix (cosmetic, fail-silent 约束下难修)
fab CLI 内嵌 cron helper (违反 cli 设计原则)
E4 用户自定义 session_id 列表 (UUID 反人类, A+B 范围解析已足够)

confidence.pressure_pass: TASK-04 (Phase -0.5 Range Resolution) — read_first includes SKILL.md current state, convergence has 5 grep-verifiable criteria, action specifies exact phase placement + parser regex shape
confidence.weakest_dimension: estimation_accuracy — depends on SKILL.md edit verbosity and 集成测试 surface; risk: ±2h drift
residual_risks: rc.24 rebase introduces schema_version conflict — mitigate via TASK-01 explicit version bump check
AGENTS.md rebase text conflict — manual merge in TASK-09
